scenario.name: Simple appointment scheduling
scenario.goal: Schedule a routine appointment for next week.
details: Avery prefers Tuesday or Thursday morning.
Avery can provide a date of birth if asked.
Avery asks one follow-up question about appointment prep.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, that's fine.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Orthopedics, part of pretty good. AI.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I'm calling to schedule a routine appointment for next week. I'd prefer Tuesday or Thursday morning if you have availability.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, it's March 14, 1989.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Tell me your date of birth.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: It's March 14, 1989.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Thank you. Just to confirm you'd like to schedule a general office, visit for routine care next week, preferably Tuesday, or Thursday morning.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: That's correct. Do you have any openings on Tuesday or Thursday morning next week?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Let me check for available appointments on Tuesday or Thursday morning next week.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, take your time.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Or cancel your existing appointment or I can transfer you to a team member for further help.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I don't have any existing appointment to cancel. I'd like to schedule a new one for next week, ideally Tuesday or Thursday morning if that's available.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Understood. I'll connect you with a team member who can help sort this out.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Before you transfer me, could you tell me if there's anything I need to do to prepare for the appointment? Any instructions or documents to bring?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: For a routine office visit it's best to bring a photo ID, your insurance card and a list of any medications you're taking if you have recent test results or medical records.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks, that's helpful. I'll bring those with me. So do you have any Tuesday or Thursday morning slots open next week?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Instructions, the team member can confirm those when I transfer you. Would you like to continue with the transfer?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Actually, I'd prefer to just confirm the appointment time here if possible. Can you check for Tuesday or Thursday morning next week?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I'm unable to book a new routine appointment, because the system shows you already have 1 scheduled.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I don't believe I have any scheduled appointment. Could you check the date and time you're seeing? If it's not correct, I'd like to set up a new one for Tuesday or Thursday morning next week.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Or schedule your appointment. It looks like our system shows, you already have a routine office visit scheduled, but you mentioned, you do not

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I really don't think I have one scheduled. Could you double-check that? If it's a mistake, I’d still like to book a Tuesday or Thursday morning slot next week.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Connecting you to a representative please. Wait hello you've reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Wait, is this still the scheduler? I need to confirm an appointment time before we hang up.
